content:
General
Based on your solution, the task currently lacks any key programming elements such as lists, sets, dictionaries, string manipulation, loops, conditions…

Please include one or more programming elements so that the task is a programming one rather than a purely maths one.

Formatting
* Please study the formatting syntax on this page: https://www.codingame.com/playgrounds/40701/help-center/statement , and format your statement properly by following the example there.

Thanks.
